title: Temperature Swings Forecast for Charlotte Area
summary: Cooler temperatures expected Tuesday, followed by a warm-up with record-breaking heat predicted for Friday.

title: Woman Charged with Murder in Gaston County Shooting

summary: Residents express concerns over infrastructure gaps and lack of services related to a new affordable housing project.
